texto: Cognitive insight (knowing something) is not like emotional insight (feeling something). It has no psychodynamic effects. It does not affect the narcissist's behavior patterns, or his interpersonal interactions - the products of well entrenched and rigid defense mechanisms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sam Vaknin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Cognitive insight (knowing something) is not like emotional insight (feeling something). It has n…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, narcissism, psychology pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de psychology.
